title: WEEKNUM glitch?
excerpt: Am I misunderstanding the way this function should work, or is it always one off?

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Am I misunderstanding the way this function should work, or is it always one off?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @jscottsmith

Seems all right to me, this is ISO-8601 week numbering.

There are different systems to calculate week numbers (rule of four, rule of Thursday, rule of St. Benedict). A good article can be found here:

The Old New Thing – 11 Mar 16

On week numbering in the United States

We don't really do it.

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
That makes sense. However, try turning on week numbers in the date widget. Wouldn’t you think they would match?

Scott

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure, I did not get that part. You are using the formula column, right?

Indeed, you would expect the formula column WEEKNUM({Date}) to display the same as the weeknum in the date column. In my book (I am an ISO-8601 adept) the formula column is right and the date column is showing the wrong week number.

I would contact support on this one.
